overall.description: Static game engine footage of a gothic great hall with students in robes seated at long wooden dining tables. The scene features high vaulted ceilings, iron chandeliers, and stone architecture reminiscent of a medieval castle or wizarding school. The atmosphere is dimly lit with cool tones and no camera movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle dining hall with long house tables

agents.ego_description: standing still in the great hall observing the students and architecture from a fixed position

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at the nearest table with back to camera
student sitting at the central table facing towards the hall's end

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and dark wooden beams
ornate hanging chandeliers with multiple candle-style lights suspended from ceiling
long rectangular wooden tables arranged in rows throughout the hall
simple wooden benches paired with the dining tables
dark stone walls with vertical wooden paneling and trim
rectangular framed paintings hanging on the upper walls
elaborately carved stone structure with decorative details in the foreground right

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic great hall with high vaulted ceilings and iron chandeliers. Students in dark robes sit sparsely at long wooden dining tables. The stone walls feature framed portraits, and an ornate carved stone structure stands in the right foreground. The scene remains completely still with no camera movement or significant action.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a gothic great hall that maintains a consistent mood of solemn stillness. It begins with a wide perspective of the high vaulted ceilings and heavy iron chandeliers hanging above the space. The camera remains fixed as it captures students in dark robes seated sparsely at long wooden dining tables. The scene then settles on the surrounding stone architecture, highlighting framed portraits on the walls and an ornate carved stone structure in the right foreground. Finally, the composition holds steady, preserving the dim, cool lighting and the absolute silence of the medieval environment.
